mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ATCH_FILE (BOARD_SEQ, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE) VALUES (#{boardSeq}, #{originalName}, #{savedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_SEQ, BOARD_SEQ, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, DATE_FORMAT(CREATED_AT, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS CREATED_AT FROM TB_ATCH_FILE WHERE BOARD_SEQ = #{boardSeq} ORDER BY FILE_SEQ
SELECT FILE_SEQ, BOARD_SEQ, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE FROM TB_ATCH_FILE WHERE FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq}
